OCS Testbench — frontend not yet built

This is a placeholder served by internal/appl.FrontendHandler when the embedded web/dist output has not been replaced by a real Vite build. Feature #22 wires the frontend build pipeline; once it ships, web/dist/index.html is regenerated by Vite and this placeholder is overwritten.

The application's REST API and SSE endpoints remain available regardless of the frontend state.
